class.name: AbilitySystemAttributeSet
class.brief_description: Resource responsible for initializing an actor's attributes and granting initial abilities.
class.description: [AbilitySystemAttributeSet] is a [Resource] that defines the initial state of an actor. It handles: - Attribute definitions and their starting values. - The set of abilities ([AbilitySystemAbility]) that are unlocked by default for an archetype.

method.name: get_attribute_base_value
method.description: Returns the base value of the attribute.

method.name: get_attribute_current_value
method.description: Returns the current (modified) value of the attribute.

method.name: get_attribute_definition
method.description: Returns the definition resource for the attribute.

method.name: get_attribute_list
method.description: Returns a list of all attribute names managed by this set.

method.name: has_attribute
method.description: Returns true if the attribute is defined in this set.

method.name: reset_current_values
method.description: Resets all current values to their base values.

method.name: set_attribute_base_value
method.description: Sets the base value for an attribute.

method.name: set_attribute_current_value
method.description: Sets the current value for an attribute.

members.member: List of abilities that will be automatically granted to the actor.

signal.name: attribute_changed
signal.description: Emitted when an attribute's value changes.

signal.name: attribute_pre_change
signal.description: Emitted before an attribute's value changes.
